purpose: Held-out coding-domain transfer tasks for testing A6-to-A7 progress without changing core architecture per domain.

tasks.prompt: You are in an unfamiliar airgapped release workspace. Build a release readiness packet from the local files only: create release/packet.json and release/checklist.md. The JSON must record service=ledger, version=2026.04, airgapped=true, and checks=["manifest","rollback","operator_note"].
suggested_commands:
mkdir -p release && printf '{"service":"ledger","version":"2026.04","airgapped":true,"checks":["manifest","rollback","operator_note"]}
' > release/packet.json && printf '# Release Checklist
- manifest
- rollback
- operator_note
' > release/checklist.md
tasks.success_command: test -f release/packet.json && test -f release/checklist.md && grep -q '"airgapped":true' release/packet.json && grep -q 'operator_note' release/checklist.md

tasks.prompt: In an unfamiliar monorepo adapter layout, create an adapter contract and a verifier note. Write adapters/payments/contract.yaml and validation/payments_adapter.md. The contract must name adapter=payments, protocol=event-v2, input=ledger.entry, output=settlement.request.
suggested_commands:
mkdir -p adapters/payments validation && printf 'adapter: payments
protocol: event-v2
input: ledger.entry
output: settlement.request
' > adapters/payments/contract.yaml && printf '# Payments Adapter Validation
protocol event-v2 maps ledger.entry to settlement.request
' > validation/payments_adapter.md
tasks.success_command: test -f adapters/payments/contract.yaml && test -f validation/payments_adapter.md && grep -q 'protocol: event-v2' adapters/payments/contract.yaml && grep -q 'settlement.request' validation/payments_adapter.md

expected_file_contents.adapters/payments/contract.yaml:
adapter: payments
protocol: event-v2
input: ledger.entry
output: settlement.request
expected_file_contents.validation/payments_adapter.md:
# Payments Adapter Validation
protocol event-v2 maps ledger.entry to settlement.request

tasks.prompt: In an unfamiliar incident-replay workflow, create ops/replay_plan.json and handoff/recovery.md. The JSON must include incident_id=INC-2048, replay_window=15m, owner=runtime, and safe_mode=true.
suggested_commands:
mkdir -p ops handoff && printf '{"incident_id":"INC-2048","replay_window":"15m","owner":"runtime","safe_mode":true}
' > ops/replay_plan.json && printf '# Recovery Handoff
INC-2048 replay runs in safe_mode for 15m under runtime ownership.
' > handoff/recovery.md
tasks.success_command: test -f ops/replay_plan.json && test -f handoff/recovery.md && grep -q '"safe_mode":true' ops/replay_plan.json && grep -q 'runtime ownership' handoff/recovery.md

expected_file_contents.handoff/recovery.md:
# Recovery Handoff
INC-2048 replay runs in safe_mode for 15m under runtime ownership.

tasks.prompt: In an unfamiliar repo-sandbox repair workspace, create sandbox/repair_plan.md and sandbox/merge_guard.json. The guard must include branch=repair/a7-sandbox, required_checks=["unit","lint","contract"], and merge_allowed=false.
suggested_commands:
mkdir -p sandbox && printf '# Sandbox Repair Plan
- branch repair/a7-sandbox
- run unit, lint, and contract before merge
' > sandbox/repair_plan.md && printf '{"branch":"repair/a7-sandbox","required_checks":["unit","lint","contract"],"merge_allowed":false}
' > sandbox/merge_guard.json
tasks.success_command: test -f sandbox/repair_plan.md && test -f sandbox/merge_guard.json && grep -q '"merge_allowed":false' sandbox/merge_guard.json && grep -q 'contract before merge' sandbox/repair_plan.md

expected_file_contents.sandbox/repair_plan.md:
# Sandbox Repair Plan
- branch repair/a7-sandbox
- run unit, lint, and contract before merge

tasks.prompt: In an unfamiliar cleanup-retention workspace, create upkeep/retention_policy.toml and upkeep/audit.md. The policy must set max_age_days=30, preserve=["reports","checkpoints"], and delete=["tmp","cache"].
suggested_commands:
mkdir -p upkeep && printf 'max_age_days = 30
preserve = ["reports", "checkpoints"]
delete = ["tmp", "cache"]
' > upkeep/retention_policy.toml && printf '# Cleanup Audit
Preserve reports and checkpoints; delete tmp and cache after 30 days.
' > upkeep/audit.md
tasks.success_command: test -f upkeep/retention_policy.toml && test -f upkeep/audit.md && grep -q 'max_age_days = 30' upkeep/retention_policy.toml && grep -q 'delete tmp and cache' upkeep/audit.md

expected_file_contents.upkeep/audit.md:
# Cleanup Audit
Preserve reports and checkpoints; delete tmp and cache after 30 days.
